title: orchis basilica
intro: Orchis basilica, also known as the lady's slipper orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orchis basilica are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions, such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and menstrual disorders, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Orchis basilica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
